11208:109698.name: Recommendation from UX: Like normal, start with the icons in the upper right followed by the content in the top left. Next, move to the live webcam feed Then, move to the connection tag; the icons associated with recording; and the preset dropdown For the icons please use phrasing like “All apps” and “Add an app” Finally, move to the settings panel on the right
11208:109698.text_content:
Recommendation from UX: 

Like normal, start with the icons in the upper right followed by the content in the top left.
Next, move to the live webcam feed
Then, move to the connection tag; the icons associated with recording; and the preset dropdown
For the icons please use phrasing like “All apps” and “Add an app”
Finally, move to the settings panel on the right

11208:109699.text_content:

11208:94107.layer_name: FW Updates as Custom DDPM Toasts

11208:94177.name: When: the battery low notification appears, AND the notification is resolved: Then: the battery low notification does not appear again for 10 minutes.
11208:94177.text_content:
When: the battery low notification appears, AND the notification is resolved:
Then: the battery low notification does not appear again for 10 minutes.

11208:94192.name: Any of the items in Priority 1 must pop up immediately, and dismiss any currently active OSD If two P1s are triggered at the same time, or if another P2 is active, the most recent P1 will take priority If a P1 OSD is triggered immediately after a P2 is triggered and is currently displayed, the P2 trigger will be dismissed and P1 will take over
11208:94192.text_content:
Any of the items in Priority 1 must pop up immediately, and dismiss any currently active OSD
If two P1s are triggered at the same time, or if another P2 is active, the most recent P1 will take priority
If a P1 OSD is triggered immediately after a P2 is triggered and is currently displayed, the P2 trigger will be dismissed and P1 will take over

11208:94194.name: P2 items do not need to be surfaced right away, and can be queued behind any P1 items P2 items will appear immediately after P1 items are dismissed, time out, or interacted with When multiple P2 items are triggered at once, P2 items can be added to a timed queue, and show one after the other
11208:94194.text_content:
P2 items do not need to be surfaced right away, and can be queued behind any P1 items
P2 items will appear immediately after P1 items are dismissed, time out, or interacted with
When multiple P2 items are triggered at once, P2 items can be added to a timed queue, and show one after the other

11208:94196.name: Custom DDPM Toasts are shown in a queue, and are unaffected by P1/P2 OSDs. Each message will be shown for 5 sec before progressing to the next one. EXCEPTION: Remote Management toasts will be shown for 5 minutes.
11208:94196.text_content:
Custom DDPM Toasts are shown in a queue, and are unaffected by P1/P2 OSDs.
Each message will be shown for 5 sec before progressing to the next one.
EXCEPTION: Remote Management toasts will be shown for 5 minutes.
